review: the coupons often doesnt work one of the reason is it says its not available at this time of day but i know when is breakfast the second one i had was buy a mcflurry get a snack wrap for free the otptikns where both mcflurry so it did not let me take the coupon

Hilarious incompetence. New phone, I tap the login link and get Login or Sign Up. I have an existing account so I enter my e-mail address. The app responds "Account already exists. Please try again." No kidding, that's the one I'm trying to log into! But the app only goes down the new-user route (despite the Login *or* Sign Up message). No other way to try and log in, so bye-bye points!
